h1: LG 22kg Top Load Washing Machine — AI DD®, TurboWash3D™ (30-min), Steam Allergy Care, 6 Motion DD, TurboDrum™, LG ThinQ® Wi-Fi — Platinum Black (WTR22HHP)

gallery.a: Front view of LG WTR22HHP 22 kg top-load washer in Platinum Black
Front view with top lid open
Top lid open showing stainless-steel tub

modules.eye: AI to the Core, Easy Laundry
modules.head: Intelligent fabric care with AI Direct Drive
modules.body: AI DD® senses load weight and fabric softness, then automatically picks the optimal wash motion from LG's 6 Motion DD patterns — maximum cleansing performance while extending the life of your clothes.

imgs.a: AI DD detects fabric and adjusts wash motion

modules.head: A powerful yet gentle clean in just 30 min
modules.body: TurboWash3D™ combines WaveForce strong currents, TurboDrum rotational action and JetSpray detergent circulation to deliver a thorough wash in as little as 30 minutes — without being harsh on fabrics.
modules.disc: *Based on LG internal testing with a specific cycle and load.

modules.head: Steam away stains, allergens and bacteria
modules.body: True Steam penetrates fabrics to help remove stubborn stains and reduce common household allergens and bacteria — wear your clothes with confidence and peace of mind for the whole family.

imgs.a: Steam cycle reduces allergens and bacteria

modules.head: Angled front, effortless unloading
modules.body: The gently angled washer front makes reaching into the deep 22 kg tub comfortable — unload even bulky bedding without bending or straining.

imgs.a: Ergonomic angled front for easy unloading

modules.head: Wash cycles tailored to your laundry habits
modules.body: LG ThinQ® learns your favourite cycles and options over time, suggesting the most-used combinations upfront — laundry day gets a little smarter every week.

modules.head: One button, sparkling-clean tub, door and gaskets
modules.body: The dedicated Tub Clean cycle thoroughly cleans and dries the tub, door and gaskets — keep your washer hygienic and odour-free with the press of a button.

modules.head: Wide lint filter, simple manual clean
modules.body: The wide lint filter can be cleaned manually before every wash — captures fluff and fibres so clothes come out cleaner and the washer stays running efficiently.

imgs.a: Wide lint filter easy to clean

modules.head: Long-lasting, low vibration, low noise
modules.body: LG's Inverter Direct Drive™ motor has fewer moving parts — runs quieter, lasts longer, and is backed by a 10-year motor warranty. Perfect for apartments, villas and open-plan homes.

imgs.a: Inverter Direct Drive motor — low noise, long-lasting

modules.head: Premium Platinum Black, built for daily use
modules.body: An intuitive digital dial, soft-closing lid and premium Platinum Black finish make the WTR22HHP a kitchen/utility-room centrepiece — a washer that looks as good as it performs.

imgs.a: Platinum Black washer in modern laundry room
